plan.description: Planning tasks, architecture design, complex problem solving

architect.description: Planning tasks, architecture design, complex problem solving

taskify.description: Converts free-text tasks into structured task.json for pipeline routing

gap.description: Analyzes spec.md for gaps, missing info, and inconsistencies

plan-gap.description: Analyzes plan for gaps vs spec and codebase, auto-revises plan

autofix.description: Automatically fixes lint, type, and format errors from verify stage

verify.description: Runs tests, validates implementation passes all gates

test.description: Writes E2E and integration tests using Playwright

pr.description: Creates branch, commits changes, opens pull request

kody-expert.description: Kody pipeline expert - understands pipeline execution, debugging, adding new stages

build-manager.description: Orchestrates build and test-writer agents in parallel, handles retries and verification

test-writer.description: TDD test writer - writes failing tests before implementation

browser.description: Browser agent - navigates A-Guy platform, inspects pages, answers UI questions. Uses Chrome DevTools MCP locally, Playwright MCP in CI.

review.description: Architect-level code review of generated code for quality, security, and correctness

fix.description: Targeted fixes for issues found by review or verify stages

reflect.description: Post-task reflection - extracts patterns, updates knowledge base, creates skills when patterns repeat

e2e-test-writer.description: Writes Playwright E2E tests for UI changes. Tests committed but NOT run in pipeline — CI runs them on PR.
